ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Exact date the book was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book's cover image */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book based on user reviews */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the book has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Publisher's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the publisher's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the book in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the book */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity of the book */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g. pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address from which the order will be billed */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of each unit of the book in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the book in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the book in the order (unit price * quantity - discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "preferred_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred genre */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the customer last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g. 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g. 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who uses the payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g. credit card, PayPal) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Last four digits of the card number (for reference) */,
  "card_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the card */,
  "billing_name" TEXT /* Name on the card */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
